channel.title: Handling translations with GTranslate plugin or other options
channel.description:
Hello community, I was trying this GTranslate wp plugin https://es.wordpress.org/plugins/gtranslate/ in a frontity project. The plugin shortocode (that I put in the homepage) get exposed to the wp rest api (image below), and I was trying to do a "content.rendered", but as expected it doesn't work because it has <script> tag and jquery functions (error image below). So, If I wanna use this specific plugin, how it should be handled with frontity?. ![error_jquery|690x144](upload://84rmq0ZJKrj0RTVMY5e03pHnY8G.png) ![gtranslate-WP-RestAPI|690x366](upload://g0KYcPxKWFH6TGdJbqRlIAVWrL5.png)
Maybe another option could be to install a npm package like this https://www.npmjs.com/package/google-translate , this should work ok with frontity , right?
Thanks in advanced

item.title: Handling translations with GTranslate plugin or other options
item.dc:creator: alex.fernando.801
item.description:
Hello community, I was trying this GTranslate wp plugin Translate WordPress with GTranslate – Plugin WordPress | WordPress.org España in a frontity project. The plugin shortocode (that I put in the homepage) get exposed to the wp rest api (image below), and I was trying to do a “content.rendered”, but as expected it doesn’t work because it has tag and jquery functions (error image below). So, If I wanna use this specific plugin, how it should be handled with frontity?.


Maybe another option could be to install a npm package like this google-translate - npm , this should work ok with frontity , right?

Thanks in advanced

Read full topic
item.source: Handling translations with GTranslate plugin or other options
